cards.why_line: Your fusion-reactor tour opens with SPARC's co-founder: every confinement approach, then deep on tokamak magnets.
cards.fit_line: 3¼ hrs — a week of drives at your 1.5×; pick up where you left off.

cards.why_line: You care how fusion-grade alloys behave under stress — ancient smiths solved carbon control completely blind.
cards.fit_line: 37 min ≈ 25 at your speed: fits today's drive almost exactly.

cards.why_line: An empire built on iron metallurgy and siege engineering — your ancient-military itch with a materials spine.
cards.fit_line: 3 hrs of documentary — a multi-commute saga.

cards.why_line: Zero homework: Conan and an old friend riffing — dropped yesterday, still warm.
cards.fit_line: 57 min ≈ two drives of easy hang.

categories.label: The fusion reactor tour
categories.description: Every major confinement approach, one episode each.

categories.label: Materials & making
categories.description: Metallurgy, fabs, forging — the stuff things are made of.

lex-353-whyte.title: #353 – Dennis Whyte: Nuclear Fusion and the Future of Energy
lex-353-whyte.summary: MIT's Dennis Whyte (Commonwealth Fusion co-founder) on magnetic vs inertial confinement, the Lawson criterion, and how SPARC's REBCO tape magnets differ from ITER's niobium-tin.

lex-485-kirtley.title: #485 – David Kirtley: Nuclear Fusion, Plasma Physics, and the Future of Energy
lex-485-kirtley.summary: Helion's CEO on colliding field-reversed-configuration plasmoids, direct energy recovery via induction (no steam turbine), and the D-³He fuel cycle.

titans-378-ma.title: Ep 378: Tammy Ma – Inertial Fusion Initiative, Lawrence Livermore
titans-378-ma.summary: Recorded right after the 2022 ignition shot: NIF's 192-beam laser, hohlraum target design, and the path from one shot a day to a power plant.

titans-403-tae.title: Ep 403: Michl Binderbauer – CEO, TAE Technologies
titans-403-tae.summary: TAE's neutral-beam-driven FRC and its bet on aneutronic p-¹¹B fuel.

titans-zap-levitt.title: Ben Levitt, Zap Energy
titans-zap-levitt.summary: Sheared-flow-stabilized Z-pinch: confinement from the plasma's own current — no superconducting magnets, no cryogenics.

titans-391-solomon.title: Ep 391: Wayne Solomon – Magnetic Fusion Energy, General Atomics
titans-391-solomon.summary: Tokamak fundamentals from the operators of DIII-D, the largest US tokamak.

omegatau-312-w7x.title: The Wendelstein 7-X Fusion Experiment (Ep 312)
omegatau-312-w7x.summary: A walking tour of the W7-X stellarator hall: the twisted non-planar coil geometry, MHD, and gyrokinetic simulation. The deepest stellarator episode in English.

omegatau-285-superconductivity.title: Superconductivity (Ep 285)
omegatau-285-superconductivity.summary: An ITER magnet engineer on niobium-tin vs niobium-titanium, magnet design, and quench protection — the engineering that makes confinement possible.

cleantechies-216-thea.title: #216 How Nuclear Fusion Becomes a Reality w/ Brian Berzin (Thea Energy)
cleantechies-216-thea.summary: Thea's bet: replace a stellarator's exotic precision-milled coils with ~350 simple planar coils, shaping the field in software instead of hardware.

catalyst-pacific-fusion.title: A blueprint for scalable fusion power
catalyst-pacific-fusion.summary: Pacific Fusion's pulsed-power ICF: modular Marx-generator pulsers firing in synchrony as a manufacturable alternative to NIF's laser driver.

l2m-tokamak-energy.title: The Tokamak Energy Story | Dr. David Kingham
l2m-tokamak-energy.summary: Tokamak Energy's compact spherical tokamak (ST40) and the HTS magnet bet: smaller, higher-field magnets instead of ITER-scale size.

cbc-general-fusion.title: A machine that could save us from war — and global warming
cbc-general-fusion.summary: General Fusion's magnetized target fusion: a plasma toroid injected into liquid metal and compressed by pistons. Documentary framing, lighter on engineering.

sysk-damascus-steel.title: The Mystery of Damascus Steel
sysk-damascus-steel.summary: The lost crucible-steel process: how ancient smiths achieved hardness and edge retention through carbon control nobody has fully reverse-engineered.

materialism-textiles-space.title: Textiles in Space
materialism-textiles-space.summary: Fiber science under extreme constraints: engineered textiles for spacecraft thermal and structural systems.

insidechips-semi-mfg.title: Big Changes Ahead For Semiconductor Manufacturing
insidechips-semi-mfg.summary: Fab automation, multi-die assembly, and yield: precision process control that rhymes with reactor assembly.

mtdcnc-forging.title: Forging has been around for centuries, and it still matters more than ever
mtdcnc-forging.summary: AI and simulation modernizing forging for aerospace: alloy selection, thermal modeling, tolerance control.

being-engineer-tamper.title: Daniel Kurnianto | The World's First Electronic Coffee Tamper
being-engineer-tamper.summary: CAD → simulation → tooling → production: the full product-engineering arc on a deceptively humble device.

foc-assyrians.title: The Assyrians – Empire of Iron
foc-assyrians.summary: The neo-Assyrian war machine: siege engineering, iron weapons, and administrative innovation — then collapse.

foc-sumerians.title: The Sumerians – Fall of the First Cities
foc-sumerians.summary: Writing, mathematics, irrigation, ziggurats: the engineering of the first cities, and why they fell.

foc-han-dynasty.title: China's Han Dynasty – The First Empire in Flames
foc-han-dynasty.summary: Water engineering, metallurgy, the seismoscope: how technology scaled China's first empire.

trih-netherlands-revolt.title: The Netherlands: The Revolt that Made The Modern World
trih-netherlands-revolt.summary: Dikes, shipbuilding, and commerce: how water engineering let a small power defy the Spanish Empire.

trih-washington-1.title: Washington: Hero of the Revolution (Part 1)
trih-washington-1.summary: Fortifications, supply chains, and leadership in the Revolutionary War.

conan-mcbride-returns.title: Danny McBride Returns
conan-mcbride-returns.summary: Old friends riffing on cartoons, horror sequels, and McBride's new book.

conan-groban.title: Josh Groban
conan-groban.summary: Groban's earnestness against Conan's chaos — an easy, warm hour.

smartless-emma-thompson.title: Emma Thompson
smartless-emma-thompson.summary: Thompson's wit loose in the SmartLess living room: fashion, boredom, haggis.

smartless-jlo.title: Jennifer Lopez
smartless-jlo.summary: Relaxed celebrity hang with the Bateman/Hayes/Arnett trio.

mbmbam-821.show: My Brother, My Brother and Me
mbmbam-821.title: Time Lost is Cool Lost (Ep 821)
mbmbam-821.summary: The McElroys answering advice questions with pure absurdism. No stakes at all.
